headline: Amphenol Announces Pricing of Euro-Denominated Senior Notes Offerings
summary: WALLINGFORD, Conn., May 05, 2026--Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH) (the "Company") announced today the pricing of its offering of €600 million aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2029 (the "2029 Notes") and €500 million aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2034 (the "2034 Notes" and, together with the 2029 Notes, the "Notes"). The 2029 Notes will have an interest rate of 3.375% per annum, and the 2034 Notes will have an interest rate of 3.875% per annum. The closing of the o

headline: Surging Earnings Estimates Signal Upside for Amphenol (APH) Stock
summary: Amphenol (APH) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.

headline: Apple, Amazon, TSMC Top List Of Earnings Triple Plays As Beat-And-Raise Stocks Surge
summary: Apple, Amazon and TSMC are among the largest companies to deliver earnings "triple plays" this season.
